MINI MINUTES: Cause assigned to Dept. 218 for settlement conference. Judge: Loretta M. Norris; Clerk: P. Dias; Reporter: Mary Hinds. Plaintiff appearing by and through counsel, Linda Reyes, Esq. Defendant Latanya Neneil, vacated. Co-defendant Mashike Matchette appearing in pro per.
